title: Implement safe SSN bump on NVM persist failure to prevent nonce reuse
description: In oscore_ctx_persist_ssn or error path, on final NVM failure after retries, re-acquire mutex and advance ctx->sender_seq by safety margin (e.g. +1024 or to next rotation boundary). Ensure no reuse on reboot. Update per RFC 8613 7.2. Add comment with rationale.
